Kamigoe City was pretty tiny in comparison to a lot of it's neighboring cities, ranging from only 100 or so kilometers of space. Though, this small city was quite tightly knit as a result. Most people knew eachother, like it was some big neighborhood. It was quite common for people to wave at each other from across the street and just start talking right then and there. Though, sometimes outsiders do visit for one reason or another. For Mei Mei? It was for work, duh. This place had quite a heavy amount of cursed energy tied to it, and she was here to fix that. Well, WAS. Until she met an older woman who seemed to be doing the same thing.
